name: productboard-mcp
description: MCP server for the Productboard API. Enables AI assistants (Claude, Cursor, etc.) to interact with your Productboard workspace.

tools.name: pb_feature_health_update
tools.description: Update a feature's health status, comment, and mode

tools.name: pb_feature_source_set
tools.description: Set external-source provenance metadata (system, recordId, url) on a feature — works for Jira, Salesforce, Intercom, etc. NOT a functional Jira integration connection.

tools.name: pb_note_update
tools.description: Update a note: link features, add/remove tags (auto-creates missing tag options), mark processed

tools.name: pb_tag_create
tools.description: Create tag options (batch) so they can be attached to notes

tools.name: pb_tag_list
tools.description: List existing tag options, optionally filtered by name prefix

tools.name: pb_jira_integration_list
tools.description: List Jira integrations configured in the workspace

tools.name: pb_jira_connection_list
tools.description: List feature ↔ Jira issue connections for an integration (read-only — Productboard's API does not expose create/delete)

PRODUCTBOARD_API_TOKEN.title: Productboard API Token
PRODUCTBOARD_API_TOKEN.description: Your Productboard API token. Get it from Profile & Settings → API Access in your Productboard workspace.

LOG_LEVEL.title: Log Level
LOG_LEVEL.description: Log level: trace, debug, info, warn, error, fatal. Keep at error for MCP clients.
